usage_hints.concepts_index: Do NOT read concepts.json in full. Use grep/search to look up specific keywords from your task (e.g. grep "login" .agent-atlas/concepts.json). Each keyword maps to exact file:line locations.
workflow: 1. Read this index.json to orient yourself (you are here)
2. Map your task to a domain — read the matching domains/*.md file
3. Grep concepts.json for task-specific keywords to get exact file:line pointers
4. Read only the target files — make the change
5. Append a record to history.jsonl describing what you changed and why
